cards.body: Manage hotel details, photos, amenities, policies, room types, packages, and offer content.

cards.body: Choose which demand channels can access supply and how each channel behaves.

cards.body: Connect rates, inventory, packages, add-ons, and checkout settings to the Booking Engine.

items.question: What is Extranet?
items.answer: Extranet is the hotel supply-control area inside Wink for content, rates, inventory, channels, and Booking Engine settings.

items.question: Who uses Extranet?
items.answer: Hotels use Extranet to configure the property and decide how supply should be made available across direct, partner, and channel routes.

items.question: Where should visitors go next?
items.answer: Get started free or request a demo to see how Extranet feeds every channel - direct, partner, Traveliko - through one Booking Engine at 5.5% all-in.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
